title: Raspberry Brie Bites II 15 cups
ingredients: 6 oz brie, rind removed and cut into ¾” cubes
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°.
Place the tart shell on an ungreased cookie sheet. Place a brie cube in each phyllo cup and top with a raspberry. Bake for 5-8 minutes or until the brie has melted.
